title: ferray-polynomial: complex-coefficient polynomials
description: Follow-up from #475. NumPy's polynomial classes accept complex-coefficient polynomials for signal-processing use cases (z-transform, transfer functions). ferray-polynomial only supports real f64 (and f32 for the power basis via #725). Either add ComplexPolynomial / ComplexChebyshev / etc. types parameterized over Complex<f64>, or use the trait-genericization refactor to handle real and complex via the same Poly<T> generic.
